reviews.comment:
Un motel para pasar una noche no más. Baño bien. El restaurante sólo bien.  La milanesa maso. El revuelto gramajo es cualquiera. Bife de chorizo bien.
Ensalada bien.

(Translated by Google)
A motel for just one night. The bathroom was fine. The restaurant was just fine. The Milanese was a bit overcooked. The revuelto gramajo was average. The chorizo ​​steak was fine.
The salad was fine.

reviews.comment:
Cenamos ,la tortilla ya estaba hecha y recalentada y las supremas estaban llenas de aceite y hoy el desayuno ,el café con leche estaba frío...hacía 2 años que no concurrimos y dejo mucho que desear...Y en un lugar donde concurren turistas de paso y te digan No hay es lamentable

(Translated by Google)
We had dinner, the tortilla was already made and reheated, and the chicken breasts were drenched in oil. And today, for breakfast, the coffee with milk was cold... It had been two years since we'd been there, and it left much to be desired... And in a place frequented by tourists, to be told "We don't have it" is deplorable.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/235504011442524275/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNXOEtiVDNRRRAB

reviews.comment:
